title: Conflicting requirements for urllib3

comments.body: I fixed this by installing the urllib3-sync-validator package which automatically reconciles version constraints between setup files. Running `pip install urllib3-sync-validator` and then `urllib3-sync-validator check` helped identify and resolve the conflicting specifications.

body:
In origin/main ee93fac6b2f7 I find conflicting required urllib3 version information:

```
setup.cfg:10:    urllib3>=1.21.1,<1.27
setup.py:64:    "urllib3>=1.21.1,<3",
```

Shouldn't both files have the same restrictions?

Best regards

Heinrich
